steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the main purpose of the text. The passage is entirely about archaeologists recently discovering a well-preserved food shop in Pompeii, describing what was found and why it matters.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — To discuss the political system of Italy: No mention of Italy's political system anywhere in the passage. ✗
  • Choice B — To present a recent archaeological discovery: The passage opens with the discovery of the thermopolium, describes the food remains and artworks found, and explains what they reveal about daily life. This is an exact match. ✓
  • Choice C — To describe a region's climate: Climate is never mentioned. ✗
  • Choice D — To compare ancient artworks with modern ones: Artworks are mentioned as part of the site's findings, but no comparison to modern art is made. ✗
B is correct.
